auth.label: Personal API Token
auth.description: Wise personal API token sent as an Authorization Bearer token. Create or view tokens in Wise Business under Your Account > Connect and manage apps > API tokens: https://docs.wise.com/guides/developer/auth-and-security/personal-api-token.

actions.name: get_rates
actions.description: Retrieve current or historical Wise exchange rates.

time.description: Timestamp for a specific historical exchange rate.

from.description: Period start date or timestamp for exchange rate history.

to.description: Period end date or timestamp for exchange rate history.

group.description: Interval for grouped exchange rate history.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving Wise exchange rates.

items.description: One rate object returned by the Wise Rates API.

rates.description: Rate entries returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The Wise exchange rates returned for the requested query.

actions.name: list_currencies
actions.description: List currencies supported by Wise for transfers, including codes and names.

items.description: One currency object returned by the Wise Currencies API.

outputSchema.description: The list of currencies supported by Wise.

actions.name: list_profiles
actions.description: List Wise personal and business profiles available to the authenticated personal API token.

items.description: One Wise profile object returned by the Profiles API.

profiles.description: Wise profiles returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The list of Wise profiles available to the token.
